title: Fix model frontier procedure loader validation
description: The model_performance_frontier procedure fails at run startup with 'Configuration error: At least one agent must be defined'. Update the procedure YAML/tests so deterministic procedures satisfy the current loader contract.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text:
Fixed startup validation failure for model_performance_frontier.

Root cause: the current procedure loader validates that every procedure YAML has at least one `agents` entry, even if the procedure is deterministic and does not call an agent.

Change: added a minimal no-op placeholder agent with required `system_prompt` and `initial_message`; procedure code does not invoke it. Added test assertions so this contract stays present.

Validation:
- `pytest -q plexus/cli/procedure/test_model_performance_frontier.py MCP/tools/tactus_runtime/test_model_frontier_runtime.py` -> 11 passed
- agent-section YAML check -> passed
- py_compile -> passed
